classification.reasoning: The patch introduces structural changes in the codebase, including modifications to method implementations, addition of new parameters and fields, and changes in request handling logic. It modifies classes such as AlterTableClient, GCDanglingArtifactsRequest, and TransportGCDanglingArtifacts, adding filtering capabilities and altering control flow. The patch also updates version handling and adds new tests. The localization evidence shows a mix of exact matches and pickaxe detections, indicating some structural changes rather than trivial replacements. Overall, the patch complexity aligns with TYPE_III classification, involving structural changes but not deep refactoring or complete redesign.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of ResizeResponse and Metadata classes to support new logic involving resize responses and cluster metadata.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling of resize responses and access to cluster metadata for enhanced resize operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced logic to detect stale indices related to the source index by scanning cluster metadata for indices whose resize source UUID matches the source index UUID.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AlterTableClient class, method handling resize operation preparation
hunk_descriptions.intent: To identify and track stale indices that may need cleanup before performing a resize operation.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed resize execution to conditionally perform garbage collection of stale dangling indices before executing the resize request, based on presence of a stale index UUID.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AlterTableClient class, method executing resize request
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure cleanup of stale dangling indices related to the source index before resizing, improving cluster hygiene and avoiding conflicts.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed the deleteTempIndices method and its invocation, eliminating a prior step that cleaned up dangling artifacts unconditionally.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To simplify the resize process by removing unconditional cleanup, now replaced by conditional cleanup logic integrated with resize execution.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored GCDanglingArtifactsRequest to support specifying a list of index UUIDs to delete; added serialization logic for this list and a static instance representing deletion of all dangling indices.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: GCDanglingArtifactsRequest class, constructors and serialization methods
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable targeted garbage collection of dangling indices by UUID, or deletion of all dangling indices when no UUIDs are specified.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Enhanced the garbage collection logic to handle requests specifying particular index UUIDs for deletion; if none specified, deletes all dangling indices as before.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: TransportGCDanglingArtifacts class, master operation method handling GCDanglingArtifactsRequest
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support selective deletion of dangling indices by UUID, improving control over garbage collection operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the execution of the garbage collection plan to use the new static ALL instance of GCDanglingArtifactsRequest instead of the previous singleton INSTANCE.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To align with the updated GCDanglingArtifactsRequest API that distinguishes between all and selective deletion requests.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new version constants V_6_0_4 and V_6_1_1 to the Version class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To introduce new version identifiers for compatibility and version tracking purposes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of java.util.List to support new logic involving lists in the TransportResize class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of List collections in the class, likely for enhanced request handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified error handling after a failed resize acknowledgment to perform targeted garbage collection of the resized index's dangling artifacts instead of a blanket cleanup.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: TransportResize class, method handling resize response
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve cleanup precision by deleting only the dangling artifacts related to the failed resize index, reducing unnecessary deletions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of ResizeResponse and Metadata classes to support new logic involving resize responses and metadata access.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling of resize responses and enhanced metadata operations required by subsequent code changes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced logic to detect stale resized indices by scanning metadata for indices whose resize source UUID matches the source index UUID before validating shard counts and read-only status.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AlterTableClient class, method handling resize operation preparation
hunk_descriptions.intent: To identify and track any stale resized indices related to the source index to enable their cleanup before performing a new resize operation.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed resize execution flow to conditionally perform garbage collection of stale dangling indices before executing the resize request, based on presence of a stale index UUID.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AlterTableClient class, method executing resize request
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure that any stale resized indices are cleaned up prior to initiating a new resize operation, preventing conflicts or resource leaks.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed the deleteTempIndices method and its invocation, eliminating a separate step for deleting temporary indices.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To simplify the cleanup process by integrating dangling artifact deletion directly into the resize flow, removing redundant or unused code.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored GCDanglingArtifactsRequest to support specifying a list of index UUIDs to delete, with an empty list indicating deletion of all dangling indices; added serialization logic for the new field.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: GCDanglingArtifactsRequest class, constructors and serialization methods
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable targeted garbage collection of dangling indices by UUID, improving control over cleanup operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Enhanced the garbage collection logic to delete either all dangling indices or only those specified by UUIDs in the request, by checking if the request's UUID list is empty or not.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support selective deletion of dangling indices, allowing more precise cleanup based on client requests.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Updated the execution call to use the new GCDanglingArtifactsRequest.ALL constant instead of the previous INSTANCE singleton.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To align with the new request API that distinguishes between deleting all dangling indices and selective deletion.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new version constants V_6_0_4 and V_6_1_1 to the version enumeration.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To introduce new version identifiers for compatibility and feature gating in serialization and other version-dependent logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of java.util.List to support new code involving lists in the class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of List collections in the class, likely for new request handling or response processing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified error handling after a failed resize acknowledgment to perform targeted garbage collection of the resized index UUID instead of deleting all dangling indices.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: TransportResize class, resize operation completion handler
hunk_descriptions.intent: To clean up only the specific resized index on failure, avoiding unnecessary deletion of unrelated dangling indices and improving safety.
